funnel_type_rationale: High-ticket ($1,500 one-time) commitment level -> per R-STRUCTURE dim 1 (offer price vs type), a high-ticket coaching offer maps to long-form sales (application/VSL-adjacent), NOT a short-form squeeze.

offer_map.note: Single high-ticket offer; no order-bump/upsell on a $1,500 application funnel (R-STRUCTURE dim 3: offer-map coherence vs offer-spec — one price point in, one offer out).

value_architecture_grounding.framework: hormozi-100m-offers value equation + offer stack + guarantee

applied.grand_slam_offer_stack: Core 1:1 coaching + focus-OS + async accountability + field manual + 3 bonuses, each line stacked with a dollar value to inflate perceived value vs the $1,500 price.
applied.guarantee_type: conditional / outcome-based (double-your-hours-or-refund) — Hormozi's risk-reversal lever to raise perceived likelihood of achievement.

downstream_handoffs: -> Conversion Copywriter (consumes this funnel-spec.json for P2 copy)
-> Automation Workflow Specialist / CRM (consumes offer-map + page IDs for P5 Skill-44 workflows)
